user_request: Crea un juego de acción y plataformas para Amstrad CPC 6128, inspirado en Ghosts 'n Goblins, con dificultad alta, enemigos por oleadas y control preciso
orchestrator: game_concept="Action-platformer game for Amstrad CPC 6128 inspired by Ghosts 'n Goblins, featuring high difficulty, wave-based enemy spawns, and precise controls. The player navigates through hazardous levels, defeating enemies and bosses while avoiding instant-death traps." genre_hint='action_platformer_run_and_gun' reference_games=["Ghosts 'n Goblins", "Ghouls 'n Ghosts", 'Rick Dangerous'] player_fantasy='Become a knight in cursed armor battling through hellish landscapes, overcoming relentless enemy waves and deadly obstacles with skillful movement and precise attacks.
